title: Snowflake Terraform Layout
scope_summary: Describes the directory structure, provisioning scope, and apply order for Terraform-managed Snowflake objects (databases, schemas, warehouses, native-pull runtime). Serves as an orientation guide for the Snowflake infrastructure layer within the edgartools platform.
key_constraints: Snowflake state must use a key separate from AWS account roots
Account roles and grants are NOT managed here — they live in infra/terraform/access/snowflake/
dbt models are NOT managed by this Terraform root
AWS Terraform is limited to passive cloud infrastructure (export bucket, SNS topic container, IAM role)
